DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Sep-30-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. John E. Jones, Esq. Attorney at Law, (650) 401-8200 appearing for Plaintiff and opposing party; Joshua S. White, Deputy City Attorney, CCSF, (415) 554-4259 appearing for Defendant and Moving party. Argued and the Court adopted and amended its tentative ruling as follows: Demurrer sustained with twenty days leave to amend. Plaintiff must allege a statutory basis for liability against the City and/or City employees. Order signed in open Court.(302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine CSR 5797
